    C

    call() - Method in interface org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing.TracingAdapter.SpanCallable
     
    cdiLivenessCheck() - Method in class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.health.HealthCheckProducer
    Produces a liveness health check named "demoiselle-cdi".
    configurationReadinessCheck() - Method in class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.health.HealthCheckProducer
    Produces a readiness health check named "demoiselle-configuration".
    count(InvocationContext) - Method in class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.interceptor.CountedInterceptor
     
    Counted - Annotation Interface in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.annotation
    Interceptor binding que incrementa um contador MicroProfile Metrics para cada invocação do método anotado.
    CountedInterceptor - Class in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.interceptor
     
    CountedInterceptor() - Constructor for class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.interceptor.CountedInterceptor

    executeInSpan(String, String, TracingAdapter.SpanCallable<T>) - Method in interface org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing.TracingAdapter
    Executa o callable dentro de um span de tracing.

    J

    jwtKeysReadinessCheck() - Method in class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.health.HealthCheckProducer

    M

    MetricsAdapter - Interface in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.metrics
    Abstração que encapsula o acesso ao MicroProfile Metrics.
    MicroProfileMetricsAdapter - Class in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.metrics
    Implementação real que delega para MicroProfile Metrics.
    MicroProfileMetricsAdapter() - Constructor for class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.metrics.MicroProfileMetricsAdapter
     
    module() - Element in annotation interface org.demoiselle.jee.observability.annotation.Traced
     

    N

    NoopMetricsAdapter - Class in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.metrics
    Implementação noop usada quando MicroProfile Metrics não está no classpath.
    NoopMetricsAdapter() - Constructor for class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.metrics.NoopMetricsAdapter
     
    NoopTracingAdapter - Class in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing
    Implementação noop usada quando OpenTelemetry não está no classpath.
    NoopTracingAdapter() - Constructor for class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing.NoopTracingAdapter
     

    O

    ObservabilityExtension - Class in org.demoiselle.jee.observability
    CDI Extension that detects the presence of MicroProfile Metrics, MicroProfile Health and OpenTelemetry on the classpath and conditionally registers the appropriate adapter beans.
    ObservabilityExtension() - Constructor for class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.ObservabilityExtension
     
    OpenTelemetryTracingAdapter - Class in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing
    Implementação real que cria spans OpenTelemetry com atributos do módulo Demoiselle.
    OpenTelemetryTracingAdapter() - Constructor for class org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing.OpenTelemetryTracingAdapter
     
    operation() - Element in annotation interface org.demoiselle.jee.observability.annotation.Traced

    TracingAdapter - Interface in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing
    Abstração que encapsula o acesso ao OpenTelemetry para criação de spans.
    TracingAdapter.SpanCallable<T> - Interface in org.demoiselle.jee.observability.tracing
    Interface funcional para código executado dentro de um span.

    V

    value() - Element in annotation interface org.demoiselle.jee.observability.annotation.Counted
    Nome do contador no formato "demoiselle.."
